entries.description: Frame validation returned `needs_decomposition` on scope-of-authority grounds.
entries.refutable_with: A case in which the bundle is genuinely within a single scope-of-authority and Step 1 returns `valid`.
A case in which the bundle is genuinely non-decomposable and the procedure still produces this shape.

entries.description: Scope-of-authority-as-decomposition-axis registered as a candidate compositional structure.
entries.refutable_with: A case in which scope-of-authority is NOT the load-bearing axis but the procedure still imposes it.
